approved_command_preview: Regression smoke for chatgpt-exec post-command pull fix: create an unstaged repo file, leave it uncommitted, exit 0, and verify final heartbeat/report steps succeed.
command: $ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path 'chatgpt_staging/work/post_command_unstaged_smoke' | Out-Null; Set-Content -Path 'chatgpt_staging/work/post_command_unstaged_smoke/unstaged-marker.txt' -Value 'unstaged marker created by exec post-command pull regression smoke 001' -Encoding UTF8; Write-Output 'created unstaged marker and exiting success'
